claim: Bridging research to production requires focus on practical constraints like latency, cost, and model size that academic benchmarks don't capture.
actionable: When productizing research models, prioritize latency/cost/size benchmarks in addition to accuracy metrics from academic papers.
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Paige Bailey: Research to Reality

claim: Real-world deployment requires iterative feedback loops with actual users to identify failure modes that synthetic benchmarks miss.
actionable: Start with limited production deployments and iterate based on real user feedback before full rollout.
source_title: AI Dev 26 x SF | Paige Bailey: Research to Reality
